extortion.description: Regency Media, with a rich history spanning over 40 years, was once a leader in manufacturing optical discs, VHS, and audio cassettes for Australia's top film entertainment and recorded music companies, as well as independent distributors.We are ready to upload more than 16 GB of essential corporate data such as: NDA’s, driver licenses, passports, contact numbers ande-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
